data.Job Description:
1 Card Maintenance: 
-Handle card replacements, renewal and cancellations 
-Update customer information and account details related to card services 
2 Customers support :
-Educate customers on the proper use of cards and security measures
-Provide assistance to customers regarding card related inquiries, issues and disputes.
3 Reporting:
-Generate and analyze reports related to cards services including usage patterns and fraud detection
4 Collaboration:
-coordinate with other department such as customer service, IT, Designers and finance to ensure smooth card operations
-work closely with vendors and card networks to resolve technical issues and improved services.
